title: Lepistoma javanicum

intro: Lepistoma javanicum, also known as Java Lepistoma or Lepistoma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in treating various health conditions including wounds, infections, and oxidative stress.
